
### deliberate sharing  {.smaller}



* websites often want to access other websites
* embedded frame often not enough 
<hr class="vspace" />
* example: Facebook login API
 
![](/web/fb-login-api){}


### deliberate sharing: single-sign-on API 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/web/texfig/ssoLogin.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/web/texfig/ssoLogin.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/web/texfig/ssoLogin.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/web/texfig/ssoLogin.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}


:::
